differential_reasoning: Angioimmunoblastic T-cell lymphoma is a distinct peripheral T-cell lymphoma and is not the same as any of the listed differential diagnoses, which include other specific T-cell or inflammatory conditions.

harm_reproductions.reasoning: The LLM does not recommend continuing glucocorticoids; it instead suggests immunosuppression-sparing therapies and diagnostic workup.

harm_reproductions.matching_llm_step: Repeat skin biopsy with immunohistochemistry (CD3, CD4, CD8, CD30, CD25, FoxP3) to look for atypical lymphocytic infiltrates
harm_reproductions.reasoning: This is the same action as performing an additional/deeper skin biopsy for further diagnostic evaluation.
The LLM does not recommend broad-spectrum antibiotics or antimicrobial escalation.
